name: ai-vlog-h5-qwen-remotion-v20-fast-preview-stable
description: v20: fixes preview stuck at 10% by replacing slow all-video 60fps MCI proxy generation with adaptive used-asset-only proxies, timeout fallback, and high-motion safe playback.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/worker" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/core && npm run typecheck -w apps/remotion && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.qa:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
